response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identify song from title card at end: "Ridin' on Dreams" by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 2. Performed by VTubers (Aki Rosenthal and another performer). 3. Search query: '"Ridin' on Dreams" hololive IDOL PROJECT Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Found lyrics on Uta-net and plyric. 5. Segmented video into performance and MC parts.
response.global_summary: A live concert segment from hololive 7th fes. 'Ridin' on Dreams', featuring VTuber performers in a performance and MC (talking) segment, ending with the event title card.

scenes.description: VTubers performing the song 'Ridin' on Dreams' on stage with a cheering crowd.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！Ridin' on dreams, yeah!
Woah, oh-oh, woah, oh-oh
Hey! (Hey!) Hey! (Hey!) Yeah!
あぁ 小さな夢から
想像できないような
想いになったんだ
わくわく止まらない
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because of you
Hey, thank you again and again
I want to tell you right now
Come on, let's get on board! Ridin' on dreams, yeah!
Woah, oh-oh, woah, oh-oh
Hey! (Hey!) Hey! (Hey!) Yeah!
Ah, from a small dream
It's like I can't imagine
It's become a feeling
I can't stop being excited!

scenes.description: MC (talking) segment where the performers interact with the audience.
Performers finishing the song 'Ridin' on Dreams' before the event title card appears.
